overall.description: A first-person exploration of a dystopian urban slum beneath a massive concrete overpass in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks through muddy alleys past neon-lit shacks and a burning trash pile before approaching a parked armored vehicle, with the environment characterized by green neon lighting and industrial decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow muddy alley beneath overpass with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the muddy alleyway beneath the concrete overpass, passing red and white striped barriers

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off the left side of the path
massive concrete overpass structure with faded PETROCHEM lettering visible on the underside
makeshift residential building with an illuminated balcony and air conditioning units
bright green glowing neon sign structure on a small building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow muddy alley beneath a massive concrete overpass. Red and white striped barriers line the left side while a makeshift residential shack with a lit balcony stands nearby. The camera walks forward toward a bright green neon advertisement structure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open area under overpass approaching burning trash site

events.description: orange fire light from burning trash pile becomes increasingly visible ahead, mixing with the green neon

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the muddy path toward the glowing fire source under the overpass

entered.detail: large pile of garbage and debris engulfed in flames, emitting thick smoke
derelict silver sedan parked along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves deeper under the overpass, the green neon structure passes to the left while a large burning trash pile comes into view ahead, casting an orange glow across the muddy ground. An abandoned silver car sits parked on the left as the path opens into a wider area.

scene_state.functional_zone: trash burning site with scattered debris under concrete overpass

events.description: camera slows and circles around the burning trash pile, observing the flames from different angles

agents.ego_description: circling around the large burning trash pile, observing the fire and surrounding debris

entered.detail: piles of broken concrete and construction debris scattered near the overpass supports

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and circles the large burning trash pile, which dominates the center of the frame with intense orange flames and rising smoke. Concrete rubble and debris litter the ground nearby as the green neon sign fades from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle parking area with distant city skyline visible

events.description: moving away from the fire-lit area into darker section with parked armored vehicle becoming the focal point

agents.ego_description: walking toward the parked armored vehicle with distant neon city lights visible in the background

notable_agents.action: futuristic black armored police vehicle parked on the muddy ground with emergency lights visible

entered.detail: black futuristic armored car with red emergency lights on the roof, parked facing the camera
tall buildings with illuminated windows and neon signs visible in the distance beyond the overpass

segments.scene_description: Moving past the fire, the camera approaches a futuristic black armored vehicle parked in the open area. The burning trash pile recedes behind as distant neon-lit skyscrapers become visible on the horizon, contrasting with the dark industrial overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic muddy alley that gradually opens into a wider industrial wasteland beneath a concrete overpass. It begins by moving past red and white striped barriers and a makeshift residential shack, heading toward a distant green neon advertisement. As the camera advances, the neon structure passes to the left and the path widens, revealing an abandoned silver car and a large burning trash pile that casts an orange glow across the mud. The scene then centers on the intense flames and rising smoke of the fire amidst scattered concrete rubble before the camera pivots away from the heat. Finally, the movement concludes as the fire recedes and the camera approaches a black armored vehicle, revealing a horizon of distant neon-lit skyscrapers that contrast with the dark industrial ceiling.
